title: Amcor (AMCR) Down 16% in Six Months: Is a Revival Likely?
text: Decline in volumes, higher costs and supply-chain issues are hurting Amcor's (AMCR) price performance.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For May And 6 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. " - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats, screened as of May 11, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net gains ranged 19.38%-41.39% topped by WBA and VFC.

title: 7 Dividend Aristocrats to Buy and Hold Forever
text: While the equities market has performed decently well this year, momentum noticeably faded in the past month, warranting a closer look at the dividend aristocrats to buy and hold. These enterprises command 25 years of consecutive dividend increases, offering a steady hand during troubled times.

title: Amcor (AMCR) Q3 Earnings In Line With Estimates, View Lowered
text: Amcor's (AMCR) third-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect lower volumes. The company lowered its fiscal 2023 EPS guidance range, anticipating weak demand in the fourth quarter.

title: Amcor plc (AMCR) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR ) Q3 2023 Results Conference Call May 2, 2023 5:30 PM ET Company Participants Tracey Whitehead - Head of Investor Relations Ron Delia - Chief Executive Officer Michael Casamento - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ghansham Panjabi - Baird Anthony Pettinari - Citi Keith Chau - MST Daniel Kang - CLSA Adam Samuelson - Goldman Sachs John Purtell - Macquarie Richard Johnson - Jefferies Kyle White - Deutsche Bank Jacob Cakarnis - Jordan Brook Campbell-Crawford - Bar & Joy Nathan Reilly - UBS George Stahos - Bank of America Cameron McDonald - E&P Operator Good afternoon. My name is Christie, and I will be your conference operator today.
